case_title: KEVIN MCGLYNN ET AL VS. 1000 SUTTER LLC ET AL

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-29-2022 CONTINUED TO SEP-28-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF SUBSTITUTION OF PLAINTIFF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CGC-21-594420 AND CGC-21-596064 FOR ALL PURPOSES IS DENIED. WHILE THERE ARE SOME COMMON ISSUES OF FACT AND LAW INVOLVED, THE PARTIES ARE DIFFERENT, AND THE CLAIMS ARE NOT ALL THE SAME. COMPLETE CONSOLIDATION FOR ALL PURPOSES IS NOT APPROPRIATE. IF THE PARTIES WISH TO MAKE A MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE FOR LIMITED PURPOSES (E.G. DISCOVERY ONLY, TRIAL ONLY, ETC.), SUCH MOTION MAY BE BROUGHT AT A LATER TIME. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-594420 WITH CASE CGC-21-596064
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CGC-21-594420 and CGC-21-596064 FOR ALL PURPOSES is DENIED. While there are some common issues of fact and law involved, the parties are different, and the claims are not all the same. Complete consolidation for all purposes is not appropriate. If the parties wish to make a motion to consolidate for limited purposes (e.g. discovery only, trial only, etc.), such motion may be brought at a later time.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
